concepts_used.title: 非线性与指数模型拟合
concepts_used.how_used: 使用 Bass 扩散模型预测未来公共充电电力需求，模型形式为 S 形曲线，参数 p（创新系数）和 q（模仿系数）通过历史数据拟合得到。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: According to the population of charging groups in recent years, the Bass model was used to predict the continuous changes in the future of electricity consumption.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 对八个政策或经济参数进行灵敏度分析，通过改变参数值观察成本变化，评估各措施降低成本的潜力。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Through parameter sensitivity analysis, we estimated the effect of the recommendation in four different occasions.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 明确列出三条假设：以美国为分析区域、充电能量损失、不考虑混合动力汽车，为模型简化提供依据。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption 1: we select the United States as the analysis area. Assumption 2: charging will bring energy loss. Assumption 3: the power consumption of hybrid charging vehicle is not covered.

concepts_used.title: 图表标题与编号规范
concepts_used.how_used: 使用流程图（Figure 1）展示研究范围概览，并配有标题和编号。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Figure 1 A schematic overview of the scope of this study

concepts_used.title: 关键词选取规则
concepts_used.how_used: 在摘要后列出五个关键词：Prediction of electricity; Bass model; Cost of public charging; Electric vehicle; Mobile phone。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Key words: Prediction of electricity; Bass model; Cost of public charging; Electric vehicle; Mobile phone

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用 IMRaD 结构：Introduction（背景与问题重述）、Methods（模型构建）、Results（各问题求解）、Discussion（灵敏度分析、优缺点）。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: 1 Introduction ... 2 Problem analysis ... 3 Assumptions ... 4 Calculation of public charging demand ... 5 Cost of charging in public ... 6 Analysis in different scenarios ... 7 Plans of lowering the cost ... 8 Strength and weakness

concepts_used.title: MATLAB 编程基础
concepts_used.how_used: 在附录中提供 MATLAB 代码，用于模型求解和灵敏度分析。

concepts_used.title: 模型评价的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 在 Strength and weakness 部分对模型进行评价，列出优点和缺点。
